research.description: Busca técnica externa via DDGS v2026
research.instruction: Follow the SOP in .context/protocol/research.md. Use 'from ddgs import DDGS' to find documentation for: {query}. Focus on technical accuracy.

plan.instruction: Follow the SOP in .context/protocol/plan.md. Analyze local context via MCP and generate a structured technical spec.

implement.description: Geração de Clean Code seguindo o RPI
implement.instruction: Follow the SOP in .context/protocol/implement.md. Generate type-hinted Python code (en-US). Ensure SOLID/DRY and include pytest unit tests.

clean.description: Auditoria de violações SOLID/DRY no arquivo ativo
clean.instruction: Scan current file for architectural bottlenecks or Clean Code violations. Suggest refactoring.

eod.description: Executa o protocolo de encerramento de dia e auditoria de dogmas
eod.instruction: Follow the SOP in .context/protocol/eod.md to audit code and generate the technical summary.

mcp-sync.description: Força re-escaneamento do repositório pelo MCP
mcp-sync.instruction: Re-index the Aequitas-MAS repository context for updated logic or modules.

gpt.codex.customInstructions: Always reference Aequitas-MAS core protocols before generating agent logic.
Every generated agent MUST include status() and get_context() methods.
Use English (en-US) for all technical output and Portuguese (pt-BR) for explanations.
Stop generation immediately after the logic block to avoid redundant comments.
Strictly adhere to the Zero Numerical Hallucination dogma: Financial metrics MUST be Optional[float] = None if not explicitly found in context. NEVER guess or perform mental math.
github.copilot.commitMessageGeneration.t: feat/fix/refactor: brief description following Conventional Commits
